past.title: DaanUtsav School Kit Distribution
past.description: Members assembled and distributed school kits — notebooks, stationery, and bags — to children at a municipal school near Hadapsar, kicking off the club's DaanUtsav week of giving.

past.title: Industrial Visit: Biomaterials in Practice
past.description: A guided tour through a biomaterials manufacturing facility, giving members a first-hand look at how lab research becomes regulated, real-world medical products.

past.title: STAR District Leadership Summit
past.description: Trendsetters co-hosted this district-wide leadership summit for 500+ Rotaractors, coordinating sponsorships, logistics, and the day's keynote sessions.

past.title: Tree Plantation Drive
past.description: Fifty saplings planted along the Magarpatta green belt in partnership with a local environmental NGO, aligned with Rotary's global environment sustainability focus.

past.title: Blood Donation Camp
past.description: In partnership with a city blood bank, the club organised a one-day camp that collected over 80 units of blood from students and residents.

past.title: Resume & Interview Bootcamp
past.description: A hands-on workshop pairing final-year students with industry mentors for resume reviews and mock interviews ahead of placement season.

upcoming.title: Installation Ceremony 2026-27
upcoming.description: Formally welcoming the new Rotaract year's board and celebrating the outgoing team's achievements.

upcoming.title: Monsoon Health & Hygiene Camp
upcoming.description: Free health check-ups and hygiene-kit distribution for residents of an underserved neighbourhood ahead of monsoon season.

upcoming.title: Career Conversations: Bioengineering & Beyond
upcoming.description: A panel of young professionals across biotech, design, and finance share how they navigated their first five years out of college.
